description: Configuration of resource is reporting an error. Refer to the documentation to determine appropriate remediation action.
Jumbo Packets are unable to traverse the Logical Network. Investigate into dataplane to identify why VXLAN/NVGRE encapsulated packets are being dropped.
Logical Network requires MTU overhead of 1674 bytes. Validate that EncapOverhead is configured. If EncapOverhead is not supported on the NIC, then JumboPacket needs to be at least 1674.
Required service(s) are not running which may cause impact to workloads. Validate that the required service(s) are running.
